_comment: Optional Claude Code hook that blocks the built-in Agent(team_name=...) tool when K8s mode is intended. This prevents accidentally spawning local subagents instead of K8s pods. Quick subagents (Explore, Plan) still work because they never use team_name. Add this to your ~/.claude/settings.json hooks section when doing K8s-only work.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); params=p.get('input',{}); has_team=bool(params.get('team_name')); read_only={'Explore','Plan','claude-code-guide'}; sys.exit(1) if has_team and params.get('subagent_type') not in read_only else sys.exit(0)"
